title: Regional Sea Pricing, Assistant Manager
description:
Job Summary

Lead ocean freight pricing and market analysis initiatives to optimize trade lane growth and carrier relationships across Southeast Asia, supporting LG/LX group and multinational accounts with strategic negotiation and team leadership.

Responsibilities

  • Analyze ocean freight market trends and provide actionable insights to sales teams to enhance competitive positioning
  • Facilitate clear and timely communication with internal teams and external partners to ensure alignment and operational efficiency
  • Drive growth in targeted Trade Lanes by identifying opportunities and implementing strategic initiatives
  • Monitor and report on price movements within the Asian ocean freight market to inform pricing strategies
  • Develop and maintain strong, collaborative relationships with multiple ocean carriers to secure favorable terms and service levels
  • Negotiate ocean freight rates for Intra-Asia and global export trades, managing volume agreements with carriers’ headquarters, regional headquarters, and local offices for LG/LX group and multinational accounts
  • Lead and manage the performance of local pricing staff across Southeast Asian countries to achieve team and business objectives
  • Execute ad-hoc projects and tasks as assigned by leadership to support business priorities

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business, or related field
  • Minimum of 5 years of experience in ocean freight within international freight forwarding, 3PL, or ocean container liner industries
  • Proven negotiation skills to maximize rate competitiveness and secure advantageous contracts
  • Experience managing ocean freight products for Intra-Asia and export trades from Asia
  • Ability to analyze ocean liner market information to support strategic decision-making

postedCompany.description:
LX PANTOS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

1) Global Company Profile - LX Pantos is a US$3bn Global Logistics company, Global HQ in Seoul, Korea

2) LX Pantos is a global leading company which employs about 3,600 professionals with 380 global network in 39 countries. 

3) Primary activity in Singapore is Freight Forwarding and Contract Logistics.

4) LX Pantos operates 96 offices and 68 warehouses all over the world (Total of 380 Global Network).
